title: Mallard Configuration
description: Budget, alert rules, and metric export configuration for the Mallard VS Code extension.

JsonOperand.description: A value or context field reference used as a comparison operand.

var.description: Dot-separated path into the rule context. Examples: "today.credits", "budget.percentOfBudget", "velocity.creditsPerHour", "vars.myThreshold"

JsonCondition.description: A boolean condition tree. Evaluated at runtime against the live usage snapshot.

oneOf.description: Literal true (always fires) or false (never fires).

and.description: All sub-conditions must be true (short-circuit AND).

or.description: At least one sub-condition must be true (short-circuit OR).

var.description: Truthy check on a context field. Example: {"var": "group.g1"} — fires when group g1 is active.

monthlyBudget.description: Monthly budget in USD. Set to 0 to disable budget tracking.

includedCredits.description: Premium requests included in the Copilot plan (used to colour the spend gauge).

dailyCreditAlert.description: Warn once per day when daily credit usage exceeds this threshold. Set to 0 to disable.

alerts.description: Built-in alert thresholds (independent of the custom rules system).

velocityCreditsPerHour.description: Alert when spending rate exceeds this credits/hour.

vars.description: User-defined variables. Reference in conditions as {"var": "vars.myThreshold"}.

groups.description: Named groups of rules. Set a group inactive to suppress all rules in it.

id.description: Unique group identifier. Referenced in rule active conditions as {"var": "group.<id>"}.

active.description: Condition that must be true for this group's rules to be evaluated.

rules.description: Custom alert and restriction rules evaluated against the live usage snapshot.

id.description: Unique rule identifier. Used for cooldown bookkeeping.

cooldown.description: Minimum time between firings. Examples: "1h", "30m", "1d". Defaults to 1h.

message.description: Alert message. Use {{ today.credits }} to insert live values via dot-path.

when.description: Condition that triggers the alert when true.

active.description: Optional gate — rule is only evaluated when this is true. Omit to always evaluate.

requiresAuth.description: Skip this rule unless the user is signed in to GitHub.

notify.description: Whether to surface a VS Code notification when the rule fires.

restrict.description: Optional Copilot restriction to apply when this rule fires.

mode.description: soft: show a warning banner only. hard: disable Copilot extensions.

scope.description: Which extensions are affected by a hard restriction.

graceMinutes.description: Grace period (minutes) before a hard restriction takes effect.

reEnableWhen.description: Condition that, when true, automatically clears this restriction.

branchBudgets.description: Per-branch credit caps keyed by branch name. Reference as {"var": "currentBranchCredits"}.
